tweets.name: Uniswap Labs 🦄
tweets.content:
what happens when you crosschain swap on @Uniswap?

say you want to go from USDC on Ethereum to PEPE on Base. there's no direct path, so our backend generates a plan

→ swap USDC to ETH on Ethereum
→ bridge ETH to Base
→ swap ETH for PEPE on Base

three chained actions,…

tweets.name: Uniswap Labs 🦄
tweets.content:
We created a way to chain any onchain action together. Launched with bridge + swap (aka crosschain swap). But soon you can imagine chaining anything:

• unwind LP position + swap
• swap + bid into a token auction
• fiat onramp + swap (aka onramp onto any token)
• swap + earn…

tweets.name: Uniswap Labs 🦄
tweets.content:
just shipped chained actions on @Uniswap

crosschain swapping is the first use case

a composable state machine that breaks any multi-step swap into a plan of atomic operations, self-custodial at every step

we didn't hack this on top of something else, we went back to first…

tweets.name: Uniswap Labs 🦄
tweets.content:
Crosschain swaps on Uniswap apps work the way you'd expect them to

Like any other swap

(That's the point)

tweets.name: toly 🇺🇸
tweets.content:
Having contracted to government for most of my career I can tell you with confidence - no governance org works itself out of a job. That’s not how it goes. They get bigger, more embedded, more far reaching. Every time. It’s human nature. 

So when it come to @SolanaFndn here’s your call to action: 

Stop waiting for the Foundation to shrink. The repos are open source. Thousands of hours of world class programs sitting there for free. Find a Foundation service in GitHub with revenue potential, fork it or create a moat around it, and do it better.

That’s how institutions actually get replaced - not from the inside, but by builders who move faster and capture the value. The code is literally sitting right there for you. Use it.

https://t.co/xH4u4TJc2B

tweets.name: Colin Wu
tweets.content:
Amber CEO：曾沉迷闪电式扩张后续受挫  

Amber Group CEO Michael Wu 在接受 OKX 采访时分享，他曾在 2021 年沉迷《闪电式扩张》理念，提倡不计成本的高速扩张以达到网络效应 。

但在 2022 年受挫后，他意识到 Crypto 行业的强金融属性与受制于互联网时代的闪电式扩张特性并不相符 。受黄仁勋“可以花…

tweets.name: 雨中狂睡SleepintheRain🦞
tweets.content:
$TAO 子网很早在玩，现在完全对买子网提不起兴趣。买来买去发现还不如买 $TAO 来得收益高。一是 $TAO 子网高通胀，二是 $TAO 子网流动性不足，买不了很多，主要还是在追求高风险高收益。

流动性在注意力上来之后会好很多。不过，注意力来得快去得也快，注意力散去后又是一地鸡毛。

tweets.name: 雨中狂睡SleepintheRain🦞
